events.body: Post -merge ACK 20a209f11c0b688dae97ad5d2a515d00022d7799. I've verified potential ABI changes since v0.7.0: I still stand by my previous [suggestion](https://github.com/bitcoin-core/secp256k1/pull/1707#discussion_r2233993277).
